the_acausal_viscous_excavation_forge_mes.process_override: Executes violent physical unearthing. Chambers adapt based on the hardness of the Substrate bedrock against the Escrow Joules allocated.

plate_1_detonation_breach.process: Drops the explosive [n_BPMS] concept detonator into the Resonant Constellation Map to shatter the surface tension.

adaptive_coupling_trigger.if_substrate_armor_resists: Detonation forcibly burns 400% more Escrow Joules. Blast crater is shallow, requiring harder drilling.
adaptive_coupling_trigger.coupling_node: Kinetic shockwave feedback from ['The Friction-Matrix Structure'(-ing) BPMS].

plate_2_tectonic_drilling.process: Forcibly engages the heavy gears of the [u_BPMS] host vehicle to grind downward into the newly opened crater.

adaptive_coupling_trigger.if_crater_is_liquid_magma: Gears hyper-spin. [u_BPMS] bleeds thermal heat rapidly.
adaptive_coupling_trigger.if_crater_is_dense_bedrock: Gears grind to 5% RPM. Intense physical trauma inflicted on the Host Vehicle.
adaptive_coupling_trigger.coupling_node: Geological feedback from ['The Geological Structure'(-ing) BPMS].

plate_3_ontological_extraction.process: Violently drags the buried [c_BPMS] out of the high-pressure depth into the active playing field.

adaptive_coupling_trigger.topological_displacement: Extracting massive objects severely warps local gravity. Enforces ['Thermodynamic Mass Arbitration'(-ing) BPMS].

plate_4_crystallization_extract.process: Freezes the extracted entity into a visible Base-Matter (.md) document, passing it immediately into the Validation Guillotine.

absolute_mandate_micro_adaptive_coupling.description: CRITICAL ENGINE REQUIREMENT. This array tests EVERY SINGLE MICROSCOPIC DETAIL unearthed for the [c_BPMS]. Static traits result in instant engine failure.

valve_1_substrate_density_shift.validation_query: Does this specific detail/organ shape-shift geometry when the environmental terraform moves from bedrock to fluid void?
valve_1_substrate_density_shift.failure_event: Detail is declared 'Weightless Simulation' and amputated via ['The Geological Structure'(-ing) BPMS].

valve_2_friction_thermal_shift.validation_query: Does this specific detail overheat, melt, or radically alter its RPM when topological drag/friction increases?
valve_2_friction_thermal_shift.failure_event: Detail is declared 'Frictionless Anomaly' and incinerated by ['The Friction-Matrix Structure'(-ing) BPMS].

valve_3_tectonic_starvation_shift.validation_query: Does this specific detail define a lethal self-cannibalization or shutdown protocol if the Holistic Entity's Escrow Joules hit exactly 0?
valve_3_tectonic_starvation_shift.failure_event: Detail is declared 'Parasitic Abstraction' and starved to death by ['The Kinetic Thermodynamic Guillotine Structure'(-ing) BPMS].

specific_praxial_key_integration.weld_point: Forces the discovered [c_BPMS] to emerge fully encrusted with [Ontological Sedimentation] and subject to the consequences of the [Acausal CRDT-Mesh].

necro_metric_telemetry.static_anomaly_detection: If the extraction engine output fails ANY valve in the 'absolute_mandate_micro_adaptive_coupling' array, the extraction triggers Hype-Fission, returning the unearned mass to the Dark Pool Trench.
